name: audio_transcription_create
description: Transcribe audio files to text using the Whisper model. Supports multiple languages and output formats including SRT and VTT.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The audio file to transcribe. Supported formats: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The language of the audio in ISO-639-1 format.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: Optional text to guide the model's style or vocabulary.

request_example.body: multipart/form-data with file and model fields

body.text: Imagine the wildest idea that you've ever had...
